.github/workflows/test.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 17 instead of JDK 11 for the build environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 17 to align with the target JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 17 if source/target levels remain at 11.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace separate source and target configuration in maven-compiler-plugin with the unified release flag.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using source/target with JDK 17+ is deprecated and may cause warnings or errors; release flag is the standard for cross-compilation.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add jakarta.annotation-api dependency to replace javax.annotation removed in Java 11+ and required by Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation fails due to missing javax.annotation classes which were removed from the JDK and replaced by Jakarta EE annotations in Spring Boot 3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok version to a release compatible with Java 17 and Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to compile or generate incorrect bytecode on Java 17 due to internal API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Mockito version to support Java 17 and Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Mockito versions do not support Java 17 bytecode or the Jakarta namespace required by Spring Boot 3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-surefire-plugin to a version compatible with Java 17 and modern test frameworks.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Surefire versions may fail to execute tests on Java 17 or with newer JUnit 5 versions.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 17.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions may not correctly handle Java 17 features or the release flag.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade commons-codec to a newer version.
Upgrade jacoco-maven-plugin to a newer version.
Upgrade maven-checkstyle-plugin to a newer version.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisSentin.general_idea: Replace String.format calls with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15.
Replace String.format calls with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15.
